meanings.definition: hanging cloth used as a blind (especially for a window)
the manner in which fabric hangs or falls
examples: she adjusted the drape of her skirt

meanings.definition: a sterile covering arranged over a patient's body during a medical examination or during surgery in order to reduce the possibility of contamination

examples: The cat draped herself on the sofa
the mountain was clothed in tropical trees

meanings.definition: cover or dress loosely with cloth
examples: drape the statue with a sheet
